name: VELUS Hydroquinone 5% Cream with Cica
pros: Extremely competitive price at ¥1,460 after discount
Contains hydroquinone 5% plus niacinamide and stem cell extract for targeted dark spot treatment
Solid 4.28★ rating with 2,200+ reviews shows real user satisfaction
cons: No English instructions; hydroquinone requires careful sun protection which may confuse new users
Brand VELUS has lower recognition outside Japan compared to international skincare names
shortDescription: Budget-friendly 5% hydroquinone cream with cica and stem cells for dark spots.
review: This is exceptional value for hydroquinone at under ¥1,500. The addition of centella asiatica (cica) and human stem cell extract shows thoughtful formulation beyond just the active ingredient. However, hydroquinone is potent—you'll need rigorous daily SPF protection, and Japanese-only instructions could be a barrier for newcomers. Best for experienced skincare users seeking affordable depigmentation.
